microcontroller.documentation: Updated device_macro and pin_package to match KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE requirement (DEVICE_TC4D7, IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA292_COM).

peripheral_instance.driver_rationale: Kept IfxEgtm_Atom_Pwm because module uses EGTM ATOM channels and this driver provides ATOM-specific PWM control. If a generic EGTM abstraction is preferred for migration consistency, switch to IfxEgtm_Pwm.

conflicts: Device/package mismatch: requirement requested DEVICE_TC4D7 with IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA292_COM, but template configuration provides DEVICE_TC4DX with IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA436_COM.
User-specified pins P20.8, P20.9, P20.10, P20.11, P20.12, P20.13 could not be validated against IfxEgtm_PinMap.h for the template device/package.
Exact IfxEgtm PinMap macros for EGTM1 ATOM1 on the requested pins were not found/resolved in the provided template context.
Availability of EGTM Cluster 1 ATOM1 channel outputs on the specified pins is not confirmed for the configured device/package.
